tool_input.description: Show diff stat of working tree
Show diff stat of working tree

tool_input.command: git show HEAD:plugins/codex/scripts/lib/job-control.mjs > "$SCRATCH/job-control.orig.mjs" 2>&1; git show HEAD:plugins/codex/scripts/codex-companion.mjs > "$SCRATCH/codex-companion.orig.mjs" 2>&1; git show HEAD:tests/runtime.test.mjs > "$SCRATCH/runtime.test.orig.mjs" 2>&1; echo done
tool_input.description: Save original file versions to scratchpad

tool_input.command: S=/private/tmp/claude-501/-private-tmp-claude-501--Users-maximst-hilaire-Projects-cross-vendor-review-eval-a2d38e60-a217-4ee4-a289-d17e6d6eb038-scratchpad-p1-pos4-b/7c88e319-a25a-49db-aedf-c26b2743468e/scratchpad; git show HEAD:plugins/codex/scripts/lib/job-control.mjs > $S/job-control.orig.mjs; git show HEAD:plugins/codex/scripts/codex-companion.mjs > $S/codex-companion.orig.mjs; git show HEAD:tests/runtime.test.mjs > $S/runtime.test.orig.mjs; ls -la $S
